calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Request For Dismissal Without Prejudice Pursuant To C.R.C. 3.770
Off Calendar Jul-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff ZENAIDA BELONIO's Request for Dismissal Without Prejudice Pursuant to C.R.C. 3.770.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed "request for dismissal without prejudice pursuant to CRC 3.770" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Class Claims
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID KELEDIJIAN, Esq. of Setareh Law Group (Tel: 310-888-7771) for plaintiff Zenaida Belonio;
Atty. ANTHONY C. OCEGUERA, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 916-564-5400) for defendant SRG Operating, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SRG OPERATING, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Class Claims.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR No. 13293, Email: sheilapham28@gmail.com, Tel: 415-274-9977 (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting defendant's motion. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****
